biological_replicate: donors classified as Braak stages 0-I as well as Braak stages III-IV
experimental_design: to gain a better understanding of PTMs present at early disease stages in this soluble fraction
factor_value: donors classified as Braak stages 0-I as well as Braak stages III-IV
number_of_fractions: we extracted soluble and sarkosyl insoluble fractions (S1 and P3, respectively)
number_of_technical_replicates: Three technical and biological replicates for each condition were applied.
